svg.title: diplomat-gate before and after: same agent, different outcome
svg.desc: Side-by-side terminal comparison showing an agent calling send_email. Without diplomat-gate the email is sent without approval. With diplomat-gate the same action is blocked by a YAML policy before reaching SMTP.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Same agent. Same scenario. One YAML policy apart.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Based on a publicly documented January 2026 incident.
